author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 13: 2 Tier-3 docs (crypto pivot). crypto/api.md (kernel crypto API core: registration framework, name resolution, priority dispatch, cryptd, crypto_engine, crypto_user netlink, /proc/crypto — 12 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open) + crypto/af-alg.md (userspace AF_ALG socket interface: bind/accept, ALG_SET_KEY, cmsg per-op metadata, per-class algif wrappers — 13 REQ / 9 AC, 0 open). All upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Knowledge pages registered: design-crypto-api, design-crypto-af-alg. Total: ~65 .design docs. Next: net/* expansion or kernel/sched/* deeper coverage.
